Speakers.Speaker: Skill Card Duplication at the Vermillion Clock

Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 47}By accessing the vermillion clock in the Desert of Doors, you can choose to make a copy of one of your existing Skill Cards.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Skill Cards can be duplicated at any time, but the process requires Twilight Fragments. Be sure to make a habit of collecting them for when a need arises.[n]{f 1 1}
